entity_types.description: Higher education institution conducting or supporting GraphRAG research

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: Geographic location of the university

attributes.name: research_department
attributes.description: Department or lab focused on AI or GraphRAG

entity_types.description: Business entity developing or applying GraphRAG technology

attributes.description: Industry sector, e.g., tech, finance, healthcare

attributes.name: product_focus
attributes.description: Main products or services related to AI

entity_types.description: News or content platform reporting on GraphRAG developments

attributes.name: media_type
attributes.description: Type of media, e.g., blog, news site, social platform

attributes.name: audience
attributes.description: Target audience, e.g., tech professionals, general public

entity_types.name: Developer

attributes.description: Primary goals, e.g., knowledge sharing, ethical AI advocacy

attributes.name: activity_area

attributes.name: occupation

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Partnership or joint work on projects

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media coverage or reporting about entities or topics

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Public commentary or opinion shared on social media

edge_types.name: SUPPORTS
edge_types.description: Endorsement or advocacy for a cause or entity

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Oversight or regulatory authority over entities

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于GraphRAG技术的研究、开发和应用，涉及学术、企业和媒体等多方主体。基于社交媒体舆论模拟需求，设计了8个具体实体类型（如Researcher、Company、MediaOutlet）以覆盖关键发声角色，并包含2个兜底类型（Person和Organization）确保完整性。关系类型反映了社媒互动中的工作、合作、报道、评论等真实联系。
simulation_requirement: 未来GraphRAG的发展趋势是什么？有什么领域可以被快速推进的？
